markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sales-to-delivery handoff for Daylight AI and Tavus](https://fathom.video/share/Rnri5QZgt4ouyRq7Tc7Hf_WSK3DGtZAm?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Ownership set → Kathy leads Daylight (security); William leads Tavus (video AI); George on-call support as needed](https://fathom.video/share/Rnri5QZgt4ouyRq7Tc7Hf_WSK3DGtZAm?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Daylight Phase 2 commit → 15 articles/month contingent on “timely” client reviews; Phase 1 has no quantity commit, but target 10–20 by sprint end](https://fathom.video/share/Rnri5QZgt4ouyRq7Tc7Hf_WSK3DGtZAm?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
  - [Daylight risk → high technical depth expectations; align on benchmark examples, set calibration plan, and formalize review SLAs to avoid Phase 2 friction](https://fathom.video/share/Rnri5QZgt4ouyRq7Tc7Hf_WSK3DGtZAm?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [Tavus risk → stakeholder bandwidth/unclear audience; mitigate by adding Alex + Emma to kickoff, defining ICP/voice early, and sequencing editorial → programmatic use-case pages](https://fathom.video/share/Rnri5QZgt4ouyRq7Tc7Hf_WSK3DGtZAm?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)

## Topics

### Daylight AI: account context and goals

  - [Company → Security; positioning: “managed agentic security services” (continuous AI-driven workflows vs point tools)](https://fathom.video/share/Rnri5QZgt4ouyRq7Tc7Hf_WSK3DGtZAm?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [Funding → \~$40M total; $33M Series A (Nov); strong VCs](https://fathom.video/share/Rnri5QZgt4ouyRq7Tc7Hf_WSK3DGtZAm?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [Stakeholder → CMO Maya (inbound via Stoke ex-CEO referral); lean team; fast decisions if Maya is confident](https://fathom.video/share/Rnri5QZgt4ouyRq7Tc7Hf_WSK3DGtZAm?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [CMS → Webflow (uploading friction expected to be low vs Sanity)](https://fathom.video/share/Rnri5QZgt4ouyRq7Tc7Hf_WSK3DGtZAm?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)

### Daylight AI: deliverables, terms, and expectations

  - [Phase 2 commitment → 15 articles/month; dependency: timely client reviews; no “termination for convenience” in Phase 2](https://fathom.video/share/Rnri5QZgt4ouyRq7Tc7Hf_WSK3DGtZAm?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
  - [Phase 1 (sprint) → no explicit quantity; internal target 10–20 articles by sprint end](https://fathom.video/share/Rnri5QZgt4ouyRq7Tc7Hf_WSK3DGtZAm?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [Quality benchmark → client-supplied exemplar articles mix SEO vs expert long-form; use as north star while explaining tradeoffs](https://fathom.video/share/Rnri5QZgt4ouyRq7Tc7Hf_WSK3DGtZAm?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [Review process → GrowthX standard: up to two full edits; need Maya’s explicit buy-in to keep velocity](https://fathom.video/share/Rnri5QZgt4ouyRq7Tc7Hf_WSK3DGtZAm?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Competitors (for positioning/SEO) → CrowdStrike Falcon Complete; Arctic Wolf MDR; SentinelOne Vigilance](https://fathom.video/share/Rnri5QZgt4ouyRq7Tc7Hf_WSK3DGtZAm?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)

### Daylight AI: risks and mitigations

  - [Risk → Technical depth gap at start → Misalignment could delay Phase 2](https://fathom.video/share/Rnri5QZgt4ouyRq7Tc7Hf_WSK3DGtZAm?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
      - [Mitigation → Set “calibration delta” expectations on first articles; justify early article choices; show path to increased depth over initial weeks](https://fathom.video/share/Rnri5QZgt4ouyRq7Tc7Hf_WSK3DGtZAm?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)
  - [Risk → Review bottlenecks → 15/mo jeopardized without defined SLA](https://fathom.video/share/Rnri5QZgt4ouyRq7Tc7Hf_WSK3DGtZAm?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
      - [Mitigation → Propose explicit “timely review” SLA (e.g., 3–5 business days/round); identify named reviewers; cap rewrites to 2](https://fathom.video/share/Rnri5QZgt4ouyRq7Tc7Hf_WSK3DGtZAm?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)

### Tavus: account context and goals

  - [Company → Video AI APIs for avatars (“PALS” consumer; enterprise API licensing)](https://fathom.video/share/Rnri5QZgt4ouyRq7Tc7Hf_WSK3DGtZAm?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Funding → Series B led by CRV (William has CRV relationship → credibility lever)](https://fathom.video/share/Rnri5QZgt4ouyRq7Tc7Hf_WSK3DGtZAm?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [Stakeholders → Jesse (primary); Jack exited; new Head of Product Marketing starts on kickoff day; suggested adds: Alex, Emma](https://fathom.video/share/Rnri5QZgt4ouyRq7Tc7Hf_WSK3DGtZAm?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [Current content → Low-quality, broad guides; \~200–230 pages ranked; heavy “celebrity deep fakes” traffic; major greenfield](https://fathom.video/share/Rnri5QZgt4ouyRq7Tc7Hf_WSK3DGtZAm?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [Competitors → Anam, A-Gen, Synthesia; admires ElevenLabs’ 50% consumer / 50% enterprise growth playbook](https://fathom.video/share/Rnri5QZgt4ouyRq7Tc7Hf_WSK3DGtZAm?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)

### Tavus: strategy, risks, and opportunities

  - [Direction → Start with editorial to establish voice/authority; sequence into programmatic use-case pages for scale (avoid Vappy-level custom config)](https://fathom.video/share/Rnri5QZgt4ouyRq7Tc7Hf_WSK3DGtZAm?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)
  - [Risk → Jesse bandwidth; unclear target audience/voice](https://fathom.video/share/Rnri5QZgt4ouyRq7Tc7Hf_WSK3DGtZAm?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
      - [Mitigation → Add Alex + Emma to kickoff; define ICPs, JTBDs, and approval matrix on day 1; diversify approvers to prevent bottlenecks](https://fathom.video/share/Rnri5QZgt4ouyRq7Tc7Hf_WSK3DGtZAm?tab=summary&timestamp=908.0)
  - [Performance clarity → Understand why Jack was let go (output vs quality vs results); align on success metrics (traffic, signups, API evals) and cadence](https://fathom.video/share/Rnri5QZgt4ouyRq7Tc7Hf_WSK3DGtZAm?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
  - [Upside → Programmatic use-case clusters for avatars/PALS; potential upsell when editorial foundations are set](https://fathom.video/share/Rnri5QZgt4ouyRq7Tc7Hf_WSK3DGtZAm?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)

### Kickoff logistics

  - [Both kickoffs → Next Monday; Tavus may be in-person (TBD); in-person ask can help secure more attendees](https://fathom.video/share/Rnri5QZgt4ouyRq7Tc7Hf_WSK3DGtZAm?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
  - [Ask → Proactively invite additional Tavus stakeholders (Alex, Emma) to avoid reviewer single-threading](https://fathom.video/share/Rnri5QZgt4ouyRq7Tc7Hf_WSK3DGtZAm?tab=summary&timestamp=957.0)

          - [Webflow access and publishing workflow checkpoints](https://fathom.video/share/Rnri5QZgt4ouyRq7Tc7Hf_WSK3DGtZAm?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)

          - [Audience definition (consumer vs enterprise split), voice/tone guardrails](https://fathom.video/share/Rnri5QZgt4ouyRq7Tc7Hf_WSK3DGtZAm?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)

[Validation](https://fathom.video/share/Rnri5QZgt4ouyRq7Tc7Hf_WSK3DGtZAm?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)
